title: Everyday Closeness
teaser: The ordinary messages that quietly became a love story.

highlights.quote: happy birthdayymeri jaan 🥺❤️ finally the mostest best day is here cos my soulmate was born on this day!!<3 hmm baby where do i start 😭 I often think back to where we were at this point exactly one year ago, sometimes when i think back to life before i met you, it feels like an absolute blank like my life was empty, missing smth, bland in colors but ab apke sath its as if everything has become so much more beautiful, so much more colorful and theres just so much more to look forward to in life IA. every single day with you has been full of love and joy and i hope its like that for us always ❤️ a life full of dates, surprises, supporting eachother ameen when I first met you, i remember clearly going home and telling my friend i met a cute guy who was really sweet, then when u gifted me a brownie i told my friend just how nice u are, and then when u gifted me for my bday, i just knew i had been falling for u all along. i love you so so much that there are no words that could ever describe, ofcourse i can try to but ull never know the extent of how much i love you properly i bet i love everything about you maaz :( from your cutuest laugh to ur gentlest voice, ur kind and caring approach to everyone u meet, ur optimistic view in life, ur efforts and ur dedication in things, ur beautiful soul, ur lame humor, the way u take care of me, the way u love me. Gosh, i am just so so lucky to have you :( my heart is so full. if you want to know what i tell my friends about you, ill finally share it with you. I tell them that you're more than just a romantic partner, you are someone thats not just my bestfriend but also someone who inspires me to be better on a daily basis, to strive to improve on who i am and its honestly because of you that I havent been spiralling into a deep depression since last summer when internship recruitment season started. youre my rock, my confidante. before meeting you, i didnt want to get married, i was ready to stay single till like 30 (literally, i used to say this) or let my mom arrange marriage me off, but now every single day i think that i cant wait to start the next chapter of my life by ur side inshaAllah. I know that it will be full of struggles but I just know we'll find our own happiness in every single phase of life inshaAllah Moreover, the fact that u entered my life and absolutely met all of my high standards, even exceeded them, still shocks me. Recently, a single friend was telling me how she thinks she'll stay alone forever bcos of how high her standards are and i rmr i literally told her, if you wait patiently, you will find someone who meets every single quality you have ever wished for and that is so so so true for us alhamdulillah alhamdulillah. I get so scared of nazar when it comes to you and me because what we have is so solid, is so perfect mashaallah that i just know kisi ki bhi ankhein lag skti kisi ki bhi nazar lag sakti and nazar is powerful enough to take lives bas I pray Allah saves us from that and its troubles. Coming to your most important quality, your relationship w Allah. What I have looked for always in a partner and I see it in you and it just excites me so much for when im finally and officially yours in a halal manner inshaAllah. I admire the way u go to masjid to offer regular prayers, I fantasise a life when one day ill be praying behind you at home inshaallah🥰 (ik that might sound regular to you but ive never had that 🥺) I want us to be two people that can always count on eachother in every single matter including our faith because that is something that fluctuates but together, for the sake of Allah, we could love eachother properly and encourage eachother to be our best versions and im just so excited IA. idky ive teared up and started cryinf while writing this hahah, its just my heart is so full of you and is aching so much just to be with you. im just so lucky and so so proud of you. you're slowly healing a part of me that i thought was permanently broken. you make every bad experience ive had w m*n seem insignificant, infact since every single experience of mine has brought me to you, in grateful it all happened. I hope you know that you have a lifelong partner, bestfriend, cheerleader, everything in me and that I am ALWAYS rooting and praying for you, for our families, for our futures inshaAllah i love you so much, have a lovely birthday IA(with me plss) and may u have many many more (with me pls) ameenn 🥺 may Allah provide u w every happiness in this life and the next ❤️ and ofcourse provide u me 🥰🥰 what else could you needd hehe 😘 jaldi se apne ghar pr batadete hain ab, i hope youre as excited and nervous as me hehe ik its going to be tough but we'll overcome it IA stay the same always, love me always🤪😜 happy birthday meri jaan 💗

highlights.quote: Dear Durriya, I've spent an entire year with you, and it’s truly been the most amazing experience of my life to know you, to be with you, to love and care for you, to appreciate every little moment, from our lovely coffee dates to attending events together at IBA. Honestly, it feels almost like a beautiful dream that I never wanted to end. I’ve felt more emotions and created more wonderful memories with you than I ever imagined possible tbh mujhay kabhi nahi lagta tha that Id get someone amazing, and I genuinely want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all those special times. You asked what I love about you, and honestly, I had to pause and reflect deeply because there's so much about you that is amazing (had to think what isn’t amazing because I found everything lovely). You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. I started sharing this with you subah, but my eyes filled with tears, and the words just wouldn’t come out. One of the very first things that made me fall for you was your incredible compassion and kindness. You genuinely cared, you listened to me patiently, and you were always there when I needed you the most. I've never truly experienced such care and support and understanding until you walked into my life and ap ne dikhaya that how it feels good to be loved for and cared for, someone who’d wait for my msg and someone who wants me to be safe. You made everything feel easier, warmer, and incredibly special. Looking back, I often wonder how I was fortunate enough to have someone as amazing as you by my side especially during the difficult times, like my job hunt. You were my strength, my comfort, and my hope through it all. And the same for the dental treatment wala part. As time passed and I joined AKU, our connection grew even stronger (your dream place haha and your moms too). Being able to meet up during events, spending quality time together, and experiencing life by your side was genuinely very precious. I remember how I casually mentioned the idea of you earning with me and you never said no and stepped up to help me with the C-Vision work. You encouraged and pushed me to finally explore freelancing on upwork, something I hadn't considered possible for the past three years. Your belief in me provided the motivation and courage I needed to start something meaningful, and for that, I'll always be eternally grateful. I wanted to earn more, achieve more, and create a better future so that I could offer you everything you deserve. Even during times when I was working tirelessly for long hours, feeling burned out, you were my constant support. Your reassurance made all the difference, reminding me it's okay, that we would make it through together. Thank you deeply for always being so understanding, thoughtful, and supportive. Your thoughtful gestures and sweet gifts have a special place in my heart. The chocolates, especially the beautiful hand bracelet you gave me to wear, the birthday gifts were so cuteeee and lovely! I cant stop missing our food adventures in DHA exploring new places, discovering cozy coffee spots, simply enjoying each other’s presence made me feel genuinely alive. I was never someone who went out often, but with you, I wanted to experience the world every single day. Every moment spent together was precious and beautiful. I miss those spontaneous days when I'd pick you up after PE sessions aur uske baad we d spend the whole day together HAHAH and it all would flow by so quickly and I would be sad when I had to be dropping u off to campus. Seeing you excel at L’Oréal filled me with immense pride and happiness. Watching you thrive and achieve your dreams means the world to me and IA very soon you will get into an amazing MNC and I am genuinely praying a lot for you! Everything will work out in the best way IA! Not sure, how long we have together but I wrote all this to let you know that the woman I fell in love with was and is perfect in my eyes literally every single part of you. Every single thing all those small details about u makes you uniquely you and I know there cant be someone ever like you! You are genuinely the most pure, honest, caring, thoughtful, and loving person I've ever known. Thank you, Durriya, for being you, for everything. I love you for everything and I will never stop cherishing the good memories we created and the wonderful time we had! ~ With love

highlights.quote: Its a long read. So sit down, keep some water with you and read it with an honest heart. I have to tell you something and i know you ll be hurt hearing this. I wanted to say this yesterday but you're happy yesterday and i didnt want to ruin it for you. But now i cant keep it in me because the fear of losing you without telling you kills me every second. Before i say anything i absolutely want to know that my feelings for you and me being your friend are 2 different things and i have never mixed these up, I was never your friend just because I had feelings for you and i dont want to change that any further from here. I want you to listen what i have to say. I have had feeliings for you before i even started my CA it was a mere crush back then but i did like you and i never knew it would be this serious, but in my unconciousness i always was i guess. I chose CA over university because of you ( weird ikr because then it was just a crush). I wanted to earn every bit of money i can and be financially stable as soon as i can for you. I tried and i studied and i worked extremely hard(yk it better than anyone else) You know how eager ive been to get on my feet for mother, the one reason i never mentioned was you. My mothrr and you were the reasons i have done and achieved what i have and you both are the reasons why i want to earn sm to give you both the happiness you both deserve. Every time i failed it killed me because it was a step back on being with you. I am not telling you this because i did some sort of ehsaan on you, no never i want you to know that you are worthy of all of this and so much more, never settle for less. I dont want you to ackownledge anything i just needed you to hear this. Ye tou hogyi of my useless working hard. About my feelings for you, I have had feelings for you like i said since July of 2021, i dont know how i did why i did but i just did and I have loved every moment of it. The initial months were scary, you know for a guy who overthinks as much as me, i got scared and worried to the thought of anyone liking you or you liking anyone. That part i guess was the beginning of what brought me close to Allah, i prayed and i prayed alot. For the next 2 years i didnt miss a tahajud where i didnt pray for us. I did cry a bit of times ahahahahaha i will not lie but yeah. Its been 3.5 years and its always in my prayers. I think like is not the strongest word i can use right now so infact i do love you samiya, and i really like that feeling. I admire how you stand by me and are my peace in the toughest times and i really feel good when im your safe space. I dont know how exactly to say what i feel except that. i love you i care about you. Im saying everything i can think of right now (masjid me betha hu hath kaanprhhe😭). Now what the reality is; I know im not worthy of you samiya, but ever since day 1, i cannot comprehend losing you to another man. I swear i seriously cannot, that is my worst nightmare and lol while im typing this someone who barely knows you gets to have a chance, isnt that a bit unfair. Anyways, since i couldnt comprehend that thought i tried to make myself better and i swear on my Allah ever since i have tried my best to be worthy of you, be it how i talk, how my physique is, how i think, how i go with my life, how i dress and where i am financially. I have tried everyday so hard and i dont mind a day because YOU ARE WORTH IT, you're worth the hard work, the trouble the grind. I know I am still no where near being worthy of you but I am trying i promise I am. I'd do that for the rest of my life if it means to have you. There is no right thing i wouldnt do to have you. Part 2 of reality. I know, and i know well you dont like me or have feelings for me. Im aware of the reality in your house too but like i said i dont know how to give up, and you? To give up on you? I dont know how to do that. I know that you can find someone way better than me and that thought sucks for me because i tried doing nothing wrong. I know you dont believe in love and thats the toughest thing I have to get through. What i ask of you: Samiya, like i said i know the reality and trust me i have over thought every single reality before it has occured over the past 3 years. I know you dont like me i know I am not the best guy, but Samiya i want you to TRY for one time, for 1 day, i want you to try, to think about what i can offer, what your life would be with me, if i can keep you happy, if i can provide for you, if i can be the man you want me to be. The answer to all those thoughts for 1 day is all i want.All I have ever done in the last 3.5 years is try and try again and again to be with you. Please try for me, for something good that i may have done for you. I can only request you, I know how you operate and I know it will be difficult but still I really want you to, Try. If you are willing to try then theres nothing that cannot happen. Do not worry about hurting me What i think of you: I think you are an amazing person, you are mature, intellectual sensible all in the right proportions. You're humorous anr caring and more than anything youre there for people. Dont get me started on your looks ahahah. I find you attractive and i think thats more than enough to say. I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

milestones.representative_quote: Hi guys, as the semester has officially ended, I just wanted to extend a heartfelt congratulations to each and every one of you on making it through! This semester must have been hard with courses like FM, but your unwavering dedication helped you through. I am super glad that I took this opportunity to be your TA (honestly, I said no once to NJA already but reconsidered). You all are a bunch of wonderful souls, and I'd never forget when you all celebrated my birthday and gave me those cute chits🫶🏻 I hope I was able to, in some way, make some impact in your lives. Many of you would have just 2 years left in IBA. While grades and parhayee do matter, remember to make *MEMORIES* and live every moment to the fulleet because you're not going to get this time back. Lots of amazing things to come your way, so make sure to grab every opportunity and avail them to the fullest! Also now for some real talk bas ab semester poora houne wala hai, idk how it was for you guys but it was absolutely amazing for me and I wish it never ended but here we are :( But the point i’m trying to make here is, most of u have 2 years left in uni; make the most of them! Also enjoy your summer vacations too as third year mein aakar itni unnecessary stress hai; you start thinking about your future ke internship kahan karni hai job kahan karni hai generally future ka kya hona hai and pata nahi kya kya. And I hope you guys remember that whatever happens, it’s always always always for your betterment Here are a few things i’ve learnt this year, and i kind of want you all to know: - God’s plan is always better. It’s always a good idea to accept and adapt rather than whine about how things are - If you really want something to happen, you pray for it, and you work for it. Never let anyone tell you, you can't do something because u can! - You do not get the results you want if you are not putting in the hours consistently. So, while it may seem cliché you need to be dedicated. Things aren't always gifted in a plate. - Sometimes, things do not seem good at the surface level, but everything always turns out okay, let it be grades or anything else. Don't worry about them and just give your best. There are things you can control and things you can't. Always focus on things you CAN control. - Your nature and manners are the most important thing you have. People will always remember the respect you give them the most, and they'll also reciprocate. - Make sure you have your priorities straight and your goals aligned - If anything goes wrong, always pray. prayer is key to success and your efforts serve as a roadmap in achieving that success. Take care of yourself!🥺 it’s completely okay if you don’t get the grade you want, bas ye course nikal gaya bari baat hai tbh. Keep working hard, IA sab ki GPA raise hougi and agar nahi hui tou next semester hai na; aag laga dena sab🥰 After the final marks come, it’s unlikely that we will interact related to FM again. But in future if you're ever in need of any support or guidance or you find yourself at some crossroads in life, i’m always here and always a dm away, please never hesitate🫶🏻 Love and prayers for you all! Your fav TA

milestones.representative_quote: Super sleepy rn baby but couldn't stop myself from writing to you BECAUSE I'M SO EXCITED🥺, your *special* day today as YOU'RE FINALLY CONCLUDING YOUR 6 WEEKS INTERNSHIP!!! I'm super proud of you baby❤️ going through it was no easy feat but you have done it MashaAllah! I acknowledge all the hardships and challenges you had to face but alhamdulillah you stood tall and gave your best. Remember it doesn't matter who cares and who doesn't, you should never let others define you but your efforts. Ik it personally the amount of efforts you make and InnshaAllah I can't wait to see you ending on a high note🥺🫶🏻 So, just be calm, relaxed and give your best shot while delivering the presentation. Remember, no one knows what's in script or what you've to say next so even if you forget, keep going. Replace the filler words like "umm" "you know" (i do them a lot) with small pauses, they make a big difference. And lastly, make winning postures and be optimistic ❤️ take deep breath and rehearse as you can. It's natural to be anxious, you got this jaan! I would love to see you acing it InnshaAllah, I'm already so proud of you. I believe in you <3 With all my love❤️, goodluck baby

milestones.representative_quote: Life after graduation? Smooth sailing at GSK! One month ago, I began my journey at GSK as a Finance Trainee, and it’s been an incredible experience so far! 🚀 Graduating from IBA this May was a proud milestone, and stepping into the professional world has been an exciting new chapter. Thankfully, GSK’s supportive culture made the transition seamless. The environment here is collaborative, welcoming, and focused on growth, making every day an opportunity to learn and thrive. As a Finance Trainee, I get the chance to work on projects that align with my interests and passion for the field. It’s been thrilling to expand my understanding of finance in such a dynamic and setting. The work-life balance here has been remarkable, and it’s not just about work! I got to experience a new take on team bonding. Our finance department recently had a picnic which was a refreshing way to connect with colleagues outside the office. 🏖️ I’m truly grateful to my Line Manager, @AsadSaleem, for his guidance and mentorship. I’m excited to continue learning and contributing under his leadership as I navigate this journey. Looking forward to discovering more about life at GSK and growing both personally and professionally in the months ahead!

milestones.representative_quote: happy birthdayymeri jaan 🥺❤️ finally the mostest best day is here cos my soulmate was born on this day!!<3 hmm baby where do i start 😭 I often think back to where we were at this point exactly one year ago, sometimes when i think back to life before i met you, it feels like an absolute blank like my life was empty, missing smth, bland in colors but ab apke sath its as if everything has become so much more beautiful, so much more colorful and theres just so much more to look forward to in life IA. every single day with you has been full of love and joy and i hope its like that for us always ❤️ a life full of dates, surprises, supporting eachother ameen when I first met you, i remember clearly going home and telling my friend i met a cute guy who was really sweet, then when u gifted me a brownie i told my friend just how nice u are, and then when u gifted me for my bday, i just knew i had been falling for u all along. i love you so so much that there are no words that could ever describe, ofcourse i can try to but ull never know the extent of how much i love you properly i bet i love everything about you maaz :( from your cutuest laugh to ur gentlest voice, ur kind and caring approach to everyone u meet, ur optimistic view in life, ur efforts and ur dedication in things, ur beautiful soul, ur lame humor, the way u take care of me, the way u love me. Gosh, i am just so so lucky to have you :( my heart is so full. if you want to know what i tell my friends about you, ill finally share it with you. I tell them that you're more than just a romantic partner, you are someone thats not just my bestfriend but also someone who inspires me to be better on a daily basis, to strive to improve on who i am and its honestly because of you that I havent been spiralling into a deep depression since last summer when internship recruitment season started. youre my rock, my confidante. before meeting you, i didnt want to get married, i was ready to stay single till like 30 (literally, i used to say this) or let my mom arrange marriage me off, but now every single day i think that i cant wait to start the next chapter of my life by ur side inshaAllah. I know that it will be full of struggles but I just know we'll find our own happiness in every single phase of life inshaAllah Moreover, the fact that u entered my life and absolutely met all of my high standards, even exceeded them, still shocks me. Recently, a single friend was telling me how she thinks she'll stay alone forever bcos of how high her standards are and i rmr i literally told her, if you wait patiently, you will find someone who meets every single quality you have ever wished for and that is so so so true for us alhamdulillah alhamdulillah. I get so scared of nazar when it comes to you and me because what we have is so solid, is so perfect mashaallah that i just know kisi ki bhi ankhein lag skti kisi ki bhi nazar lag sakti and nazar is powerful enough to take lives bas I pray Allah saves us from that and its troubles. Coming to your most important quality, your relationship w Allah. What I have looked for always in a partner and I see it in you and it just excites me so much for when im finally and officially yours in a halal manner inshaAllah. I admire the way u go to masjid to offer regular prayers, I fantasise a life when one day ill be praying behind you at home inshaallah🥰 (ik that might sound regular to you but ive never had that 🥺) I want us to be two people that can always count on eachother in every single matter including our faith because that is something that fluctuates but together, for the sake of Allah, we could love eachother properly and encourage eachother to be our best versions and im just so excited IA. idky ive teared up and started cryinf while writing this hahah, its just my heart is so full of you and is aching so much just to be with you. im just so lucky and so so proud of you. you're slowly healing a part of me that i thought was permanently broken. you make every bad experience ive had w m*n seem insignificant, infact since every single experience of mine has brought me to you, in grateful it all happened. I hope you know that you have a lifelong partner, bestfriend, cheerleader, everything in me and that I am ALWAYS rooting and praying for you, for our families, for our futures inshaAllah i love you so much, have a lovely birthday IA(with me plss) and may u have many many more (with me pls) ameenn 🥺 may Allah provide u w every happiness in this life and the next ❤️ and ofcourse provide u me 🥰🥰 what else could you needd hehe 😘 jaldi se apne ghar pr batadete hain ab, i hope youre as excited and nervous as me hehe ik its going to be tough but we'll overcome it IA stay the same always, love me always🤪😜 happy birthday meri jaan 💗

highlights.quote: Dear Durriya, I've spent an entire year with you, and it’s truly been the most amazing experience of my life to know you, to be with you, to love and care for you, to appreciate every little moment, from our lovely coffee dates to attending events together at IBA. Honestly, it feels almost like a beautiful dream that I never wanted to end. I’ve felt more emotions and created more wonderful memories with you than I ever imagined possible tbh mujhay kabhi nahi lagta tha that Id get someone amazing, and I genuinely want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all those special times. You asked what I love about you, and honestly, I had to pause and reflect deeply because there's so much about you that is amazing (had to think what isn’t amazing because I found everything lovely). You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. I started sharing this with you subah, but my eyes filled with tears, and the words just wouldn’t come out. One of the very first things that made me fall for you was your incredible compassion and kindness. You genuinely cared, you listened to me patiently, and you were always there when I needed you the most. I've never truly experienced such care and support and understanding until you walked into my life and ap ne dikhaya that how it feels good to be loved for and cared for, someone who’d wait for my msg and someone who wants me to be safe. You made everything feel easier, warmer, and incredibly special. Looking back, I often wonder how I was fortunate enough to have someone as amazing as you by my side especially during the difficult times, like my job hunt. You were my strength, my comfort, and my hope through it all. And the same for the dental treatment wala part. As time passed and I joined AKU, our connection grew even stronger (your dream place haha and your moms too). Being able to meet up during events, spending quality time together, and experiencing life by your side was genuinely very precious. I remember how I casually mentioned the idea of you earning with me and you never said no and stepped up to help me with the C-Vision work. You encouraged and pushed me to finally explore freelancing on upwork, something I hadn't considered possible for the past three years. Your belief in me provided the motivation and courage I needed to start something meaningful, and for that, I'll always be eternally grateful. I wanted to earn more, achieve more, and create a better future so that I could offer you everything you deserve. Even during times when I was working tirelessly for long hours, feeling burned out, you were my constant support. Your reassurance made all the difference, reminding me it's okay, that we would make it through together. Thank you deeply for always being so understanding, thoughtful, and supportive. Your thoughtful gestures and sweet gifts have a special place in my heart. The chocolates, especially the beautiful hand bracelet you gave me to wear, the birthday gifts were so cuteeee and lovely! I cant stop missing our food adventures in DHA exploring new places, discovering cozy coffee spots, simply enjoying each other’s presence made me feel genuinely alive. I was never someone who went out often, but with you, I wanted to experience the world every single day. Every moment spent together was precious and beautiful. You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. highlights.quote: Its a long read. So sit down, keep some water with you and read it with an honest heart. I have to tell you something and i know you ll be hurt hearing this. I wanted to say this yesterday but you're happy yesterday and i didnt want to ruin it for you. But now i cant keep it in me because the fear of losing you without telling you kills me every second. Before i say anything i absolutely want to know that my feelings for you and me being your friend are 2 different things and i have never mixed these up, I was never your friend just because I had feelings for you and i dont want to change that any further from here. I want you to listen what i have to say. I have had feeliings for you before i even started my CA it was a mere crush back then but i did like you and i never knew it would be this serious, but in my unconciousness i always was i guess. I chose CA over university because of you ( weird ikr because then it was just a crush). I wanted to earn every bit of money i can and be financially stable as soon as i can for you. I tried and i studied and i worked extremely hard(yk it better than anyone else) You know how eager ive been to get on my feet for mother, the one reason i never mentioned was you. My mothrr and you were the reasons i have done and achieved what i have and you both are the reasons why i want to earn sm to give you both the happiness you both deserve. Every time i failed it killed me because it was a step back on being with you. I am not telling you this because i did some sort of ehsaan on you, no never i want you to know that you are worthy of all of this and so much more, never settle for less. I dont want you to ackownledge anything i just needed you to hear this. Ye tou hogyi of my useless working hard. About my feelings for you, I have had feelings for you like i said since July of 2021, i dont know how i did why i did but i just did and I have loved every moment of it. The initial months were scary, you know for a guy who overthinks as much as me, i got scared and worried to the thought of anyone liking you or you liking anyone. That part i guess was the beginning of what brought me close to Allah, i prayed and i prayed alot. For the next 2 years i didnt miss a tahajud where i didnt pray for us. I did cry a bit of times ahahahahaha i will not lie but yeah. Its been 3.5 years and its always in my prayers. I think like is not the strongest word i can use right now so infact i do love you samiya, and i really like that feeling. I admire how you stand by me and are my peace in the toughest times and i really feel good when im your safe space. I dont know how exactly to say what i feel except that. i love you i care about you. Im saying everything i can think of right now (masjid me betha hu hath kaanprhhe😭). Now what the reality is; I know im not worthy of you samiya, but ever since day 1, i cannot comprehend losing you to another man. I swear i seriously cannot, that is my worst nightmare and lol while im typing this someone who barely knows you gets to have a chance, isnt that a bit unfair. Anyways, since i couldnt comprehend that thought i tried to make myself better and i swear on my Allah ever since i have tried my best to be worthy of you, be it how i talk, how my physique is, how i think, how i go with my life, how i dress and where i am financially. I have tried everyday so hard and i dont mind a day because YOU ARE WORTH IT, you're worth the hard work, the trouble the grind. I know I am still no where near being worthy of you but I am trying i promise I am. I'd do that for the rest of my life if it means to have you. There is no right thing i wouldnt do to have you. Part 2 of reality. I know, and i know well you dont like me or have feelings for me. Im aware of the reality in your house too but like i said i dont know how to give up, and you? To give up on you? I dont know how to do that. I know that you can find someone way better than me and that thought sucks for me because i tried doing nothing wrong. I know you dont believe in love and thats the toughest thing I have to get through. What i ask of you: Samiya, like i said i know the reality and trust me i have over thought every single reality before it has occured over the past 3 years. I know you dont like me i know I am not the best guy, but Samiya i want you to TRY for one time, for 1 day, i want you to try, to think about what i can offer, what your life would be with me, if i can keep you happy, if i can provide for you, if i can be the man you want me to be. The answer to all those thoughts for 1 day is all i want.All I have ever done in the last 3.5 years is try and try again and again to be with you. Please try for me, for something good that i may have done for you. I can only request you, I know how you operate and I know it will be difficult but still I really want you to, Try. If you are willing to try then theres nothing that cannot happen. Do not worry about hurting me What i think of you: I think you are an amazing person, you are mature, intellectual sensible all in the right proportions. You're humorous anr caring and more than anything youre there for people. Dont get me started on your looks ahahah. I find you attractive and i think thats more than enough to say. I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

milestones.representative_quote: Dear Durriya, I've spent an entire year with you, and it’s truly been the most amazing experience of my life to know you, to be with you, to love and care for you, to appreciate every little moment, from our lovely coffee dates to attending events together at IBA. Honestly, it feels almost like a beautiful dream that I never wanted to end. I’ve felt more emotions and created more wonderful memories with you than I ever imagined possible tbh mujhay kabhi nahi lagta tha that Id get someone amazing, and I genuinely want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all those special times. You asked what I love about you, and honestly, I had to pause and reflect deeply because there's so much about you that is amazing (had to think what isn’t amazing because I found everything lovely). You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. I started sharing this with you subah, but my eyes filled with tears, and the words just wouldn’t come out. One of the very first things that made me fall for you was your incredible compassion and kindness. You genuinely cared, you listened to me patiently, and you were always there when I needed you the most. I've never truly experienced such care and support and understanding until you walked into my life and ap ne dikhaya that how it feels good to be loved for and cared for, someone who’d wait for my msg and someone who wants me to be safe. You made everything feel easier, warmer, and incredibly special. Looking back, I often wonder how I was fortunate enough to have someone as amazing as you by my side especially during the difficult times, like my job hunt. You were my strength, my comfort, and my hope through it all. And the same for the dental treatment wala part. As time passed and I joined AKU, our connection grew even stronger (your dream place haha and your moms too). Being able to meet up during events, spending quality time together, and experiencing life by your side was genuinely very precious. I remember how I casually mentioned the idea of you earning with me and you never said no and stepped up to help me with the C-Vision work. You encouraged and pushed me to finally explore freelancing on upwork, something I hadn't considered possible for the past three years. Your belief in me provided the motivation and courage I needed to start something meaningful, and for that, I'll always be eternally grateful. I wanted to earn more, achieve more, and create a better future so that I could offer you everything you deserve. Even during times when I was working tirelessly for long hours, feeling burned out, you were my constant support. Your reassurance made all the difference, reminding me it's okay, that we would make it through together. Thank you deeply for always being so understanding, thoughtful, and supportive. Your thoughtful gestures and sweet gifts have a special place in my heart. The chocolates, especially the beautiful hand bracelet you gave me to wear, the birthday gifts were so cuteeee and lovely! I cant stop missing our food adventures in DHA exploring new places, discovering cozy coffee spots, simply enjoying each other’s presence made me feel genuinely alive. I was never someone who went out often, but with you, I wanted to experience the world every single day. Every moment spent together was precious and beautiful. I miss those spontaneous days when I'd pick you up after PE sessions aur uske baad we d spend the whole day together HAHAH and it all would flow by so quickly and I would be sad when I had to be dropping u off to campus. Seeing you excel at L’Oréal filled me with immense pride and happiness. Watching you thrive and achieve your dreams means the world to me and IA very soon you will get into an amazing MNC and I am genuinely praying a lot for you! Everything will work out in the best way IA! Not sure, how long we have together but I wrote all this to let you know that the woman I fell in love with was and is perfect in my eyes literally every single part of you. Every single thing all those small details about u makes you uniquely you and I know there cant be someone ever like you! You are genuinely the most pure, honest, caring, thoughtful, and loving person I've ever known. Thank you, Durriya, for being you, for everything. I love you for everything and I will never stop cherishing the good memories we created and the wonderful time we had! ~ With love

highlights.quote: Its a long read. So sit down, keep some water with you and read it with an honest heart. I have to tell you something and i know you ll be hurt hearing this. I wanted to say this yesterday but you're happy yesterday and i didnt want to ruin it for you. But now i cant keep it in me because the fear of losing you without telling you kills me every second. Before i say anything i absolutely want to know that my feelings for you and me being your friend are 2 different things and i have never mixed these up, I was never your friend just because I had feelings for you and i dont want to change that any further from here. I want you to listen what i have to say. I have had feeliings for you before i even started my CA it was a mere crush back then but i did like you and i never knew it would be this serious, but in my unconciousness i always was i guess. I chose CA over university because of you ( weird ikr because then it was just a crush). I wanted to earn every bit of money i can and be financially stable as soon as i can for you. I tried and i studied and i worked extremely hard(yk it better than anyone else) You know how eager ive been to get on my feet for mother, the one reason i never mentioned was you. My mothrr and you were the reasons i have done and achieved what i have and you both are the reasons why i want to earn sm to give you both the happiness you both deserve. Every time i failed it killed me because it was a step back on being with you. I am not telling you this because i did some sort of ehsaan on you, no never i want you to know that you are worthy of all of this and so much more, never settle for less. I dont want you to ackownledge anything i just needed you to hear this. Ye tou hogyi of my useless working hard. About my feelings for you, I have had feelings for you like i said since July of 2021, i dont know how i did why i did but i just did and I have loved every moment of it. The initial months were scary, you know for a guy who overthinks as much as me, i got scared and worried to the thought of anyone liking you or you liking anyone. That part i guess was the beginning of what brought me close to Allah, i prayed and i prayed alot. For the next 2 years i didnt miss a tahajud where i didnt pray for us. I did cry a bit of times ahahahahaha i will not lie but yeah. Its been 3.5 years and its always in my prayers. I think like is not the strongest word i can use right now so infact i do love you samiya, and i really like that feeling. I admire how you stand by me and are my peace in the toughest times and i really feel good when im your safe space. I dont know how exactly to say what i feel except that. i love you i care about you. Im saying everything i can think of right now (masjid me betha hu hath kaanprhhe😭). Now what the reality is; I know im not worthy of you samiya, but ever since day 1, i cannot comprehend losing you to another man. I swear i seriously cannot, that is my worst nightmare and lol while im typing this someone who barely knows you gets to have a chance, isnt that a bit unfair. Anyways, since i couldnt comprehend that thought i tried to make myself better and i swear on my Allah ever since i have tried my best to be worthy of you, be it how i talk, how my physique is, how i think, how i go with my life, how i dress and where i am financially. I have tried everyday so hard and i dont mind a day because YOU ARE WORTH IT, you're worth the hard work, the trouble the grind. I know I am still no where near being worthy of you but I am trying i promise I am. I'd do that for the rest of my life if it means to have you. There is no right thing i wouldnt do to have you. Part 2 of reality. I know, and i know well you dont like me or have feelings for me. Im aware of the reality in your house too but like i said i dont know how to give up, and you? To give up on you? I dont know how to do that. I know that you can find someone way better than me and that thought sucks for me because i tried doing nothing wrong. I know you dont believe in love and thats the toughest thing I have to get through. What i ask of you: Samiya, like i said i know the reality and trust me i have over thought every single reality before it has occured over the past 3 years. I know you dont like me i know I am not the best guy, but Samiya i want you to TRY for one time, for 1 day, i want you to try, to think about what i can offer, what your life would be with me, if i can keep you happy, if i can provide for you, if i can be the man you want me to be. The answer to all those thoughts for 1 day is all i want.All I have ever done in the last 3.5 years is try and try again and again to be with you. Please try for me, for something good that i may have done for you. I can only request you, I know how you operate and I know it will be difficult but still I really want you to, Try. If you are willing to try then theres nothing that cannot happen. Do not worry about hurting me What i think of you: I think you are an amazing person, you are mature, intellectual sensible all in the right proportions. You're humorous anr caring and more than anything youre there for people. Dont get me started on your looks ahahah. I find you attractive and i think thats more than enough to say. I think you'd make for a wonderful wife and an even better mother (a real og desi mom😅). So dont blame me for wanting you. Youre one to spend the rest of the life with. Anyways, none of what my feelings or efforts I have done in the last few years were asked by you and i in no sense want to imply that i did some ehsaan on you. I did that because I love you samiya and you are worth every single effort. Prospective answer, I know, because I know you, and it hurts me because someone will get you without doing anything while i tried sm, worked hard sm, prayed sm and i could never, *maybe*. But still doesnt stop me from trying. Also i needed you to hear this. Why speak now? Because at first before telling I wanted to be something capable for you, to have achieved smth for you, im almost there but I couldnt wait, the fear of losing you without you knowing scares me more than being trapped in a haunted house. I wanted to speak. before too yet i couldnt because i promised Allah i wouldnt untill i become something myself, but Allah himself brought me here. Khair. The words in my brain have to come an end, now since you are my friend ill speak a little whats in my heart. I want you to choose me and i want you to be there for me and i want to spend the rest of my life beside you. I want to marry you, thats all i have ever dreamt of since day 1. I want to be your safe space i want to be one that provides for you, and Allah be my witness i want to make you so happy. I prayed alot, begged allah to give you in my nikkah, idk what happens from here I really like you samiya. I couldnt ever think of any girl besides you in these years, kia jaadu kia tmne pata nahi per haye... Now you know why i find you pretty in any case! Theres no woman in this world that id choose over you right now.(cringe but true 😭). I am scared of losing you, i dont want to, i hope some miracle happens, because i see my future with you.( this is raw so please excuse a little too much slip of expressions😅) Anyways umm, whatever you decide ill respect that and i dont want to think what my emotional side for you will decide because i dont think negative and umm i cant. So, think about what i said take your time all you want. I really would try and push the mountains to be with you because thats all i know; to try and pray. I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

milestones.title: A Strong Support Moment
milestones.summary: A Strong Support Moment around May 27, 2024 with supportive tone and Affection energy.
milestones.representative_quote: Hi guys, as the semester has officially ended, I just wanted to extend a heartfelt congratulations to each and every one of you on making it through! This semester must have been hard with courses like FM, but your unwavering dedication helped you through. I am super glad that I took this opportunity to be your TA (honestly, I said no once to NJA already but reconsidered). You all are a bunch of wonderful souls, and I'd never forget when you all celebrated my birthday and gave me those cute chits🫶🏻 I hope I was able to, in some way, make some impact in your lives. Many of you would have just 2 years left in IBA. While grades and parhayee do matter, remember to make *MEMORIES* and live every moment to the fulleet because you're not going to get this time back. Lots of amazing things to come your way, so make sure to grab every opportunity and avail them to the fullest! Also now for some real talk bas ab semester poora houne wala hai, idk how it was for you guys but it was absolutely amazing for me and I wish it never ended but here we are :( But the point i’m trying to make here is, most of u have 2 years left in uni; make the most of them! Also enjoy your summer vacations too as third year mein aakar itni unnecessary stress hai; you start thinking about your future ke internship kahan karni hai job kahan karni hai generally future ka kya hona hai and pata nahi kya kya. And I hope you guys remember that whatever happens, it’s always always always for your betterment Here are a few things i’ve learnt this year, and i kind of want you all to know: - God’s plan is always better. It’s always a good idea to accept and adapt rather than whine about how things are - If you really want something to happen, you pray for it, and you work for it. Never let anyone tell you, you can't do something because u can! - You do not get the results you want if you are not putting in the hours consistently. So, while it may seem cliché you need to be dedicated. Things aren't always gifted in a plate. - Sometimes, things do not seem good at the surface level, but everything always turns out okay, let it be grades or anything else. Don't worry about them and just give your best. There are things you can control and things you can't. Always focus on things you CAN control. - Your nature and manners are the most important thing you have. People will always remember the respect you give them the most, and they'll also reciprocate. - Make sure you have your priorities straight and your goals aligned - If anything goes wrong, always pray. prayer is key to success and your efforts serve as a roadmap in achieving that success. Take care of yourself!🥺 it’s completely okay if you don’t get the grade you want, bas ye course nikal gaya bari baat hai tbh. Keep working hard, IA sab ki GPA raise hougi and agar nahi hui tou next semester hai na; aag laga dena sab🥰 After the final marks come, it’s unlikely that we will interact related to FM again. But in future if you're ever in need of any support or guidance or you find yourself at some crossroads in life, i’m always here and always a dm away, please never hesitate🫶🏻 Love and prayers for you all! Your fav TA

milestones.representative_quote: Super sleepy rn baby but couldn't stop myself from writing to you BECAUSE I'M SO EXCITED🥺, your *special* day today as YOU'RE FINALLY CONCLUDING YOUR 6 WEEKS INTERNSHIP!!! I'm super proud of you baby❤️ going through it was no easy feat but you have done it MashaAllah! I acknowledge all the hardships and challenges you had to face but alhamdulillah you stood tall and gave your best. Remember it doesn't matter who cares and who doesn't, you should never let others define you but your efforts. Ik it personally the amount of efforts you make and InnshaAllah I can't wait to see you ending on a high note🥺🫶🏻 So, just be calm, relaxed and give your best shot while delivering the presentation. Remember, no one knows what's in script or what you've to say next so even if you forget, keep going. Replace the filler words like "umm" "you know" (i do them a lot) with small pauses, they make a big difference. And lastly, make winning postures and be optimistic ❤️ take deep breath and rehearse as you can. It's natural to be anxious, you got this jaan! I would love to see you acing it InnshaAllah, I'm already so proud of you. I believe in you <3 With all my love❤️, goodluck baby
milestones.short_summary: A career step that mattered to both of you around Aug 12, 2024.

I want you to know that very well, do not settle for any less. Thats it. Azaan bhi hogayi, I will go and pray. I hope things work out, i hope Allah helps me. Im sorry for not telling you earlier. Also, thankyou for being there for me, for being my peace, love you. Ps. I know wrote it so formally but idk thats how i could speak everything. Take it as a handwritten letter, alot of emotions and ik ull feel the urge to say cringe alot but thats okay. No goodbyes because im not going anywhere. Sign krdeta hu end me cool lagunga Hashir Sheikh. Full time hottie part time CA.

highlights.quote: Dear Durriya, I've spent an entire year with you, and it’s truly been the most amazing experience of my life to know you, to be with you, to love and care for you, to appreciate every little moment, from our lovely coffee dates to attending events together at IBA. Honestly, it feels almost like a beautiful dream that I never wanted to end. I’ve felt more emotions and created more wonderful memories with you than I ever imagined possible tbh mujhay kabhi nahi lagta tha that Id get someone amazing, and I genuinely want to thank you from the bottom of my heart for all those special times. You asked what I love about you, and honestly, I had to pause and reflect deeply because there's so much about you that is amazing (had to think what isn’t amazing because I found everything lovely). You're someone who embodied every wonderful quality I've ever dreamed of u r someone who is caring, understanding, and genuine. Appreciating me for who I was and always made extraordinary efforts to show your love and care. Your smile alone had the brightened my entire world during the darkest days, your voice I love hearing. I started sharing this with you subah, but my eyes filled with tears, and the words just wouldn’t come out. One of the very first things that made me fall for you was your incredible compassion and kindness. You genuinely cared, you listened to me patiently, and you were always there when I needed you the most. I've never truly experienced such care and support and understanding until you walked into my life and ap ne dikhaya that how it feels good to be loved for and cared for, someone who’d wait for my msg and someone who wants me to be safe. You made everything feel easier, warmer, and incredibly special. Looking back, I often wonder how I was fortunate enough to have someone as amazing as you by my side especially during the difficult times, like my job hunt. You were my strength, my comfort, and my hope through it all. And the same for the dental treatment wala part. As time passed and I joined AKU, our connection grew even stronger (your dream place haha and your moms too). Being able to meet up during events, spending quality time together, and experiencing life by your side was genuinely very precious. I remember how I casually mentioned the idea of you earning with me and you never said no and stepped up to help me with the C-Vision work. You encouraged and pushed me to finally explore freelancing on upwork, something I hadn't considered possible for the past three years. Your belief in me provided the motivation and courage I needed to start something meaningful, and for that, I'll always be eternally grateful. I wanted to earn more, achieve more, and create a better future so that I could offer you everything you deserve. Even during times when I was working tirelessly for long hours, feeling burned out, you were my constant support. Your reassurance made all the difference, reminding me it's okay, that we would make it through together. Thank you deeply for always being so understanding, thoughtful, and supportive. Your thoughtful gestures and sweet gifts have a special place in my heart. The chocolates, especially the beautiful hand bracelet you gave me to wear, the birthday gifts were so cuteeee and lovely! I cant stop missing our food adventures in DHA exploring new places, discovering cozy coffee spots, simply enjoying each other’s presence made me feel genuinely alive. I was never someone who went out often, but with you, I wanted to experience the world every single day. Every moment spent together was precious and beautiful. I miss those spontaneous days when I'd pick you up after PE sessions aur uske baad we d spend the whole day together HAHAH and it all would flow by so quickly and I would be sad when I had to be dropping u off to campus. Seeing you excel at L’Oréal filled me with immense pride and happiness. Watching you thrive and achieve your dreams means the world to me and IA very soon you will get into an amazing MNC and I am genuinely praying a lot for you! Everything will work out in the best way IA! Not sure, how long we have together but I wrote all this to let you know that the woman I fell in love with was and is perfect in my eyes literally every single part of you. Every single thing all those small details about u makes you uniquely you and I know there cant be someone ever like you! You are genuinely the most pure, honest, caring, thoughtful, and loving person I've ever known. Thank you, Durriya, for being you, for everything. I love you for everything and I will never stop cherishing the good memories we created and the wonderful time we had! ~ With love

highlights.quote: I'm really glad to see your text and you opening up about how you feel. I kinda felt shut down after feeling like doing behes but I think the best thing we both should do in this scenario next time is to pause foran se for a minute and remind ourselves, "we are on the same team right?" We both love each other to bits and I'm sure none of us wants to be sad or make other sad. Taking a moment and then clarifying the intentions will help us avoid these InnshaAllah. I also read a study where they shared that the couples who actively resolve conflict by mutual compassion and hearing each other tend to be the happiest and longest (manifesting us fr InnshaAllah). Also read that feelings are always real even if they feel irrational and lastly to never reply to someone sharing their problems and then bombarding them by telling them what you did wrong instead (I am sorry i guess i did that last night instead of listening to you which caused a conflict). So, we can work together on these things and simultaneously keep praying and we'll get perfect together ❤️ I know it might feel bohat agay ka, but I'd like to set things abhi se and do things that help us grow together ❤️ you matter to me so much, you can understand when u look in my eyes. I'll never wanna make u sad but I'm sorry kabhi kabhi hojata🥺 It took me so long to write because brain 5% capacity but I just wanted to write to tell you that I appreciate you so much in my life. I do listen to you and try my heart level best to follow too. You're amazing (bas naraz jaldi hojati ho ap🫣) You're my cuto, my sweetheart, my heart. I love you to bits and I hope you wake up freshie fresh on a quizzy day. I'm sorry for anything that hurt u mera baby, let's get better together and for anything I'm always here for u baby 💓 <This message was edited>

milestones.title: A Strong Support Moment
milestones.summary: A Strong Support Moment around May 27, 2024 with supportive tone and Affection energy.
milestones.representative_quote: Hi guys, as the semester has officially ended, I just wanted to extend a heartfelt congratulations to each and every one of you on making it through! This semester must have been hard with courses like FM, but your unwavering dedication helped you through. I am super glad that I took this opportunity to be your TA (honestly, I said no once to NJA already but reconsidered). You all are a bunch of wonderful souls, and I'd never forget when you all celebrated my birthday and gave me those cute chits🫶🏻 I hope I was able to, in some way, make some impact in your lives. Many of you would have just 2 years left in IBA. While grades and parhayee do matter, remember to make *MEMORIES* and live every moment to the fulleet because you're not going to get this time back. Lots of amazing things to come your way, so make sure to grab every opportunity and avail them to the fullest! Also now for some real talk bas ab semester poora houne wala hai, idk how it was for you guys but it was absolutely amazing for me and I wish it never ended but here we are :( But the point i’m trying to make here is, most of u have 2 years left in uni; make the most of them! Also enjoy your summer vacations too as third year mein aakar itni unnecessary stress hai; you start thinking about your future ke internship kahan karni hai job kahan karni hai generally future ka kya hona hai and pata nahi kya kya. And I hope you guys remember that whatever happens, it’s always always always for your betterment Here are a few things i’ve learnt this year, and i kind of want you all to know: - God’s plan is always better. It’s always a good idea to accept and adapt rather than whine about how things are - If you really want something to happen, you pray for it, and you work for it. Never let anyone tell you, you can't do something because u can! - You do not get the results you want if you are not putting in the hours consistently. So, while it may seem cliché you need to be dedicated. Things aren't always gifted in a plate. - Sometimes, things do not seem good at the surface level, but everything always turns out okay, let it be grades or anything else. Don't worry about them and just give your best. There are things you can control and things you can't. Always focus on things you CAN control. - Your nature and manners are the most important thing you have. People will always remember the respect you give them the most, and they'll also reciprocate. - Make sure you have your priorities straight and your goals aligned - If anything goes wrong, always pray. prayer is key to success and your efforts serve as a roadmap in achieving that success. Take care of yourself!🥺 it’s completely okay if you don’t get the grade you want, bas ye course nikal gaya bari baat hai tbh. Keep working hard, IA sab ki GPA raise hougi and agar nahi hui tou next semester hai na; aag laga dena sab🥰 After the final marks come, it’s unlikely that we will interact related to FM again. But in future if you're ever in need of any support or guidance or you find yourself at some crossroads in life, i’m always here and always a dm away, please never hesitate🫶🏻 Love and prayers for you all! Your fav TA

It is essential for all your team members to join the meeting and present the idea. We request you to: Have your videos open, you cannot make the same impression with a blank screen: thus, a must! Regards, Team L’Oréal HR ❤

milestones.representative_quote: happy birthdayymeri jaan 🥺❤️ finally the mostest best day is here cos my soulmate was born on this day!!<3 hmm baby where do i start 😭 I often think back to where we were at this point exactly one year ago, sometimes when i think back to life before i met you, it feels like an absolute blank like my life was empty, missing smth, bland in colors but ab apke sath its as if everything has become so much more beautiful, so much more colorful and theres just so much more to look forward to in life IA. every single day with you has been full of love and joy and i hope its like that for us always ❤️ a life full of dates, surprises, supporting eachother ameen when I first met you, i remember clearly going home and telling my friend i met a cute guy who was really sweet, then when u gifted me a brownie i told my friend just how nice u are, and then when u gifted me for my bday, i just knew i had been falling for u all along. i love you so so much that there are no words that could ever describe, ofcourse i can try to but ull never know the extent of how much i love you properly i bet i love everything about you maaz :( from your cutuest laugh to ur gentlest voice, ur kind and caring approach to everyone u meet, ur optimistic view in life, ur efforts and ur dedication in things, ur beautiful soul, ur lame humor, the way u take care of me, the way u love me. Gosh, i am just so so lucky to have you :( my heart is so full. if you want to know what i tell my friends about you, ill finally share it with you. I tell them that you're more than just a romantic partner, you are someone thats not just my bestfriend but also someone who inspires me to be better on a daily basis, to strive to improve on who i am and its honestly because of you that I havent been spiralling into a deep depression since last summer when internship recruitment season started. youre my rock, my confidante. before meeting you, i didnt want to get married, i was ready to stay single till like 30 (literally, i used to say this) or let my mom arrange marriage me off, but now every single day i think that i cant wait to start the next chapter of my life by ur side inshaAllah. I know that it will be full of struggles but I just know we'll find our own happiness in every single phase of life inshaAllah Moreover, the fact that u entered my life and absolutely met all of my high standards, even exceeded them, still shocks me. Recently, a single friend was telling me how she thinks she'll stay alone forever bcos of how high her standards are and i rmr i literally told her, if you wait patiently, you will find someone who meets every single quality you have ever wished for and that is so so so true for us alhamdulillah alhamdulillah. I get so scared of nazar when it comes to you and me because what we have is so solid, is so perfect mashaallah that i just know kisi ki bhi ankhein lag skti kisi ki bhi nazar lag sakti and nazar is powerful enough to take lives bas I pray Allah saves us from that and its troubles. Coming to your most important quality, your relationship w Allah. What I have looked for always in a partner and I see it in you and it just excites me so much for when im finally and officially yours in a halal manner inshaAllah. I admire the way u go to masjid to offer regular prayers, I fantasise a life when one day ill be praying behind you at home inshaallah🥰 (ik that might sound regular to you but ive never had that 🥺) I want us to be two people that can always count on eachother in every single matter including our faith because that is something that fluctuates but together, for the sake of Allah, we could love eachother properly and encourage eachother to be our best versions and im just so excited IA. idky ive teared up and started cryinf while writing this hahah, its just my heart is so full of you and is aching so much just to be with you. im just so lucky and so so proud of you. you're slowly healing a part of me that i thought was permanently broken. you make every bad experience ive had w m*n seem insignificant, infact since every single experience of mine has brought me to you, in grateful it all happened. I hope you know that you have a lifelong partner, bestfriend, cheerleader, everything in me and that I am ALWAYS rooting and praying for you, for our families, for our futures inshaAllah i love you so much, have a lovely birthday IA(with me plss) and may u have many many more (with me pls) ameenn 🥺 may Allah provide u w every happiness in this life and the next ❤️ and ofcourse provide u me 🥰🥰 what else could you needd hehe 😘 jaldi se apne ghar pr batadete hain ab, i hope youre as excited and nervous as me hehe ik its going to be tough but we'll overcome it IA stay the same always, love me always🤪😜 happy birthday meri jaan 💗
